task_history.action: duckduckgo_search: Meta Llama 4 Scout Maverick release April 2025
task_history.result:
INTENT: Summarize the key details from the first article regarding the Meta Llama 4 Scout Maverick release in April 2025.
The Wikipedia article states that Llama 4 was released in April 2025. The Hugging Face blog post details the release of Llama 4 Maverick and Scout, introducing a new Mixture-of-Experts architecture. A LinkedIn article confirms the public release of Llama 4 Scout and Maverick on April 5, 2025, touting them as Meta's most advanced AI models. A Techmeme article reports the release of Llama 4 Scout and Llama 4 Maverick by Meta AI on April 6, 2025. Finally, a Remio article describes Scout as having 17 billion active parameters and being designed for long workflows and analysis of massive datasets.
